name: io.github.qverisai/mcp
description: Discover, inspect and call ranked external data & tool APIs with unified billing and usage audit

environmentVariables.name: QVERIS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: QVeris API key (create one at https://qveris.ai)

environmentVariables.name: QVERIS_REGION
environmentVariables.description: Force region: 'global' or 'cn' (auto-detected from key prefix if not set)

environmentVariables.name: QVERIS_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override API base URL (highest priority, for custom endpoints)
